title: Draft Affidavit Working Document
summary: Source-status record for a family-created working draft labeled Affidavit V3 that contains attributed statements, editorial instructions, and unresolved verification items.
content_categories: Gina Gazvoda's health and treatment history as described by family members
Final-week calls, conversations, and observations attributed to family witnesses
Family concerns about requests for medical care and the emergency response
Post-death concerns involving documentation, autopsy requests, cremation, property, accounts, and estate instruments

source_quality_classes.definition: A proposed declarant's account of an event, call, conversation, or observation in which that person directly participated.
source_quality_classes.verification_rule: Attribute to the declarant and seek corroborating contemporaneous records where available.

source_quality_classes.definition: A statement describing what another person allegedly said or observed.
source_quality_classes.verification_rule: Preserve attribution and compare with the named person's testimony or contemporaneous record.

source_quality_classes.definition: A statement about medical care, banking, insurance, legal authority, accounts, forms, or official actions that depends on an underlying record.
source_quality_classes.verification_rule: Do not publish as verified without reviewing the underlying record.

source_quality_classes.definition: Text accompanied by an instruction to omit, confirm, correct, date, identify, or reconcile the assertion.
source_quality_classes.verification_rule: Exclude from verified claims until resolved and documented.

direct_source_findings: The document is organized as a numbered chronology attributed to proposed family declarants.
The text mixes firsthand accounts, attributed statements, inferences, record-dependent assertions, and allegations.
The text contains visible editing instructions requesting that statements be omitted, confirmed, corrected, dated, or supplemented with a name.
The reviewed copy does not provide a reliable basis to describe this version as a clean final signed, notarized, filed, or judicially accepted affidavit.
scope_limitations: The draft does not independently verify every statement it contains.
The draft does not determine Gina Gazvoda's cause or manner of death.
The draft does not establish criminal guilt or motive.
A later clean, signed, notarized, filed, or corrected version would require separate identification and review.
The original contains personal, medical, legal, and third-party information and is not suitable for unrestricted public hosting.

provenance.review_method: Direct text review of the archived DOCX working document
provenance.notes: The public page describes source status and evidence categories without republishing private details or unresolved allegations.

page_citations: Affidavit V3 working document, pages 1-3 reviewed
redaction_notes: The public summary excludes addresses, telephone numbers, signatures, detailed medical information, private financial information, inflammatory allegations, and unnecessary third-party identifiers.
publication_authority: Family-authorized source-status summary; not represented as a final affidavit or court record.

revision_history.change_summary: Corrected the public record from an affidavit label to a source-reviewed working-draft status.
